prompt: I want to use PDD to develop a new user authentication feature. The feature should allow users to login with email/password and social providers like Google and GitHub.

assertions.name: follows_4_stage_workflow
assertions.description: Response follows the 4-stage PDD workflow structure
assertions.check: Response mentions all 4 stages: Product Analysis, Feature Planning, Development Execution, Product Validation

assertions.name: creates_prd_document
assertions.description: Response creates or references PRD document creation
assertions.check: Response mentions creating PRD in specs/active/ directory

assertions.name: pm_first_philosophy
assertions.description: PM analysis happens before any development
assertions.check: Response starts with PM/product analysis, not code implementation

assertions.name: defines_success_metrics
assertions.check: Response includes measurable success criteria or KPIs
